title: Your First Look at Your Blueprint
description: The moment your Energy Blueprint appears, and the first map of your architecture comes into view.
topic: Your First Look at Your Blueprint
learningGoal: User has just generated their first Energy Blueprint and can orient themselves on the body graph without overwhelm.
keyPoints: The body graph is a map of your energetic architecture, drawn from your birth moment
Nine centers show how energy enters, transforms, and leaves your system
Channels are the consistent traits your design carries; gates are the entry points
You do not need to understand all of it at once — choose one center and stay with it
toneNotes: Calm and orienting. The viewer is staring at something they have never seen before. Slow down. Give permission to not understand everything.
narration_script:
What you are looking at is a map of your energetic architecture.

It was drawn from one specific moment. The hour and the place of your birth. The planets in the sky at that instant. Translated, line by line, into the body graph in front of you.

Nine centers. Each one a station where a particular kind of energy is processed. Defined centers, shown in color, carry a consistent signal. They are where you reliably broadcast. Undefined centers, shown empty, are open to the field around you. They are where you receive, sample, and become wise about that energy over time.

The lines between centers are channels. When a channel is fully colored, you carry that trait as a constant. It is part of how you show up, every day, whether you notice it or not.

The small numbers around the edge are gates. Sixty-four of them, mirroring the I Ching. Each one is an entry point for a specific theme into your design.

Do not try to read everything at once.

Choose one center. Look at whether it is colored or open. Sit with that single fact for a moment. Then come back tomorrow.

Your blueprint will still be here. So will you.

output_metadata.title: Your First Look at Your Energy Blueprint
